## Pull Request Description

<!-- Provide a brief description of your changes -->

### Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor (code cleanup, no functional change)

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested this change -->

- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] All tests pass: `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] Dashboard builds: `cd dashboard && npm run build` (if applicable)

## GPU Tested On (if applicable)

| GPU | VRAM | Speed | Context |
|-----|------|-------|---------|
| | | | |

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (see AGENTS.md)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, AGENTS.md, etc.)
- [ ] Changelog entry added (for significant changes)

## Related Issues
